Criticisms of our coverage of the conflict get a lot of coverage here, so they should be mentioned in the lead.
I removed the entire entry because I can't add these crucial details—the source leaves all the important parts out.

This source is plainly biased and whoever wrote it misinterpreted the nature of the discussion. Wikipedia did not "[deliver] its own verdict" that Israel is committing a genocide in Gaza. The renaming of the article has nothing to do with whether Israel is actually perpetrating a genocide, and the first sentence of that article isn't an attempt to "[soften] the blow by reintroducing the matter of accusation versus established fact."
